_comment: Single source of truth for the P31 social engine — schedule, waves, platforms. Worker (andromeda/04_SOFTWARE/cloudflare-worker/social-drop-automation/worker.js) loads this contract from the hub mirror at https://p31ca.org/p31-social-engine.json or has it baked in at deploy. Edit here, run npm run verify:social-engine + npm run sync:social-engine, then redeploy the Worker. PUBLIC-VOICE applies — Tier B/C surfaces. Templates expand from p31-constants.json: {{c.bonding.publicUrl}}, {{c.contact.kofiUrl}}, {{c.bonding.testBaseline.tests}}, {{c.contact.githubOrg}} etc.

voice.note: Verifier runs PUBLIC-VOICE Tier B/C regex on every payload after template expansion; Tier A is human pair check before publish.

linkedin.note: Worker poster not implemented in v2.0.0; manual paste from /trigger output until LinkedIn API path lands

ko-fi.note: No public posting API; payload reproduced for manual paste in Ko-fi feed

weekend_recap.content: Weekend build recap. Open code, repeatable verify bar. p31ca.org · github.com/{{c.contact.githubOrg}}

wave2_twitter.title: WAVE 2 — Twitter/X thread
tweets:
{{c.bonding.testBaseline.tests}} tests / {{c.bonding.testBaseline.suites}} suites. PWA. Works offline on tablets. Touch-first. No accounts. No ads. No data collection.

11 elements + 2 secret elements named after my kids. Quest chains to the Posner molecule.
Two secret elements unlock when you finish quest chains. Names mean something to one family. Code on GitHub: github.com/{{c.contact.githubOrg}}

P31 Labs — Georgia nonprofit (EIN {{c.organization.ein}}; 501(c)(3) determination pending). MIT licensed. The code outlives this housing situation; support keeps me at a desk.

{{c.contact.kofiUrl}}

Stack: TypeScript strict · React + Three.js + Zustand + Vite · Cloudflare Pages + Workers + KV · Web Audio API · IndexedDB · PWA · COPPA-aligned, zero data collection.

github.com/{{c.contact.githubOrg}}

wave3_linkedin.title: WAVE 3 — LinkedIn long-form
wave3_linkedin.content:
I shipped a multiplayer chemistry education game on my son's 10th birthday: BONDING. Players drag atoms, form bonds following VSEPR geometry, and build molecules from hydrogen up to the Posner molecule. {{c.bonding.testBaseline.tests}} automated tests across {{c.bonding.testBaseline.suites}} suites. Offline-first PWA targeting tablet devices.

Every interaction is timestamped for evidence-grade export — designed for contexts where proof of engagement matters.

TypeScript strict, React + Three.js, deployed on Cloudflare. MIT licensed.

P31 Labs is a Georgia nonprofit building open-source assistive technology (EIN {{c.organization.ein}}; 501(c)(3) determination pending).

{{c.bonding.publicUrl}} · p31ca.org · github.com/{{c.contact.githubOrg}}
